headline.primary_headline: Why Are 30 Million Women Losing Their Hair?
headline.subheadline: The ONLY hair loss therapy designed exclusively for a woman's biochemistry offers new hope for those suffering in silence.
headline.promise_compression: 30 million affected + solution designed just for women

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: Why is this happening? What can women specifically do?

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Hair loss products are made for men and don't work for women
schema_analysis.new_schema: Keranique is designed exclusively for female biochemistry

headline.vsl_adaptation: If you're one of the 30 million American women hiding your thinning hair under hats and scarves... there's finally a treatment designed specifically for YOUR biochemistry

lead.opening_verbatim: If you are a woman suffering from hair loss or thinning hair, you are not alone. According to the American Academy of Dermatology, more than 30 million American women are coping with the daily nightmare of hair loss. That means 30 million women are facing the same stress, worry and embarrassment every time they look in the mirror or comb their hair.
lead.transition_to_body: And these women are searching for a better way...

mechanism.mechanism_description: Keranique contains the only FDA-approved ingredient for women's hair regrowth at a concentration safe for female biochemistry (unlike men's 5% minoxidil products). Works with women's natural body chemistry to restore scalp and rebuild hair richness.
mechanism.clinical_claim: 2.7 times the hair growth in clinical trials
mechanism.fda_approved: Only FDA ingredient approved for women

proof_elements.verbatim: According to the American Academy of Dermatology, more than 30 million American women
2.7 times the hair growth using the FDA-approved ingredient
the only FDA ingredient approved for women
researchers behind the International Hair Institute

key_sections.content_verbatim: For years, the discussion of women's hair loss has been taboo. While the market for products dealing with men's hair loss has exploded, women struggling with their own hair loss issues were forced to suffer alone, hiding under wigs, scarves and hats...or worse.

Many women have tried popular hair loss treatments designed for men which contain 5% minoxidil. But such a high percentage concentration can cause serious side effects and is NOT recommended for use by women by the FDA.
In clinical trials, women experienced 2.7 times the hair growth using the FDA-approved ingredient in Keranique

leading_causes_list: Age: 50% of women experience hair loss by 50
Hormones: Imbalances may shrink hair follicles
Genetics: Family history may cause hair loss
Stress: Can lead to hormonal imbalances
Scalp: Poor care can accelerate hair loss
Diet: Lack of protein, iron can impede growth

testimonial.quote: I truly love this product. My husband, who notices nothing, keeps telling me my hair looks thicker. And I can tell my roots are getting stronger!

price_points.offer: 30 day Risk FREE trial for small shipping fee

bonuses: Keranique Follicle Boosting Serum FREE with promo code KQ100 113
offer.urgency_mechanism: Supplies are limited - made in small batches

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Strong gender-specific positioning with solid authority and clinical claims

The 'husband who notices nothing' testimonial is relatable proof
6 causes of hair loss creates educational value

extraction_notes.key_insight: The 'suffering in silence' and 'taboo' framing creates powerful emotional validation - women finally have permission to address this problem
